Config.Name: PSFree
Config.Description:
PSFree is a lightweight local HTTP server for hosting the PSFree PlayStation 4 jailbreak web interface.
This container runs a self-contained Python web server and exposes a configurable Web UI port. For best compatibility with consoles, HTTP is used (no HTTPS).
Best practice: • Run in br0 network mode with its own IP address • Set the Web UI port to 80 on that IP
This allows simple redirects without a reverse proxy.
Redirecting clients: • PiHole or AdGuard Home: create a DNS rewrite (e.g. manuals.playstation.net → container IP) • Typical firewalls (pfSense / OPNSense): use DNS override or simple NAT redirect
Redirect manuals.playstation.net to this container's IP (host: manuals, domain: playstation.net)
On PS4, just visit the User Guide and that's it.
No additional configuration is required after deployment.
